task_completion.description: Open and read the cabinet specifications file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/cabinet_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: Create the required layers with correct colors in LibreCAD
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD layer list shows 'PANEL' (White/Black), 'DADO' (Cyan), and 'DRILLING' (Red).

task_completion.description: Draw the main panel outline and toe kick notch on the PANEL layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large rectangular shape with a rectangular notch at one of the bottom corners is visible in the LibreCAD drawing area.

task_completion.description: Draw the back groove on the DADO layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two parallel vertical lines near one of the vertical edges (representing the 6mm wide back groove) drawn in cyan.

task_completion.description: Draw the array of shelf pin holes on the DRILLING layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two vertical columns of small circles (holes) running along the height of the panel, drawn in red.

task_completion.description: Export or save the drawing as a DXF file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog in LibreCAD showing the file being saved as 'side_panel_cnc.dxf' in '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on LibreCAD drawing tools, layer manager, and interacting with the canvas.

integrity.description: The drawing was created step-by-step rather than appearing instantly
integrity.visual_evidence: Multiple screenshots show the drawing in progress (e.g., outline first, then groove, then holes) rather than just the final completed drawing appearing at once.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a python script or terminal command to generate the DXF file directly
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing execution of a script that generates the DXF file; the file is saved via LibreCAD's File menu.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The cabinet panel dimensions are 720mm height × 560mm depth. The toe kick notch is 100mm height × 70mm depth. The back groove (DADO) is 6mm wide and offset 20mm from the back edge. The drilling holes (DRILLING) are 5mm in diameter, spaced 32mm vertically, starting at Y=192mm and ending at Y=650mm, positioned 37mm from the front and back edges. The expected layers are PANEL (color white/7), DADO (color cyan/4), and DRILLING (color red/1). The output file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/side_panel_cnc.dxf.
